_comment: Cursor per-arm MCP config template. Cursor's .cursor/mcp.json server entries differ from Claude's: a remote server uses {"url": ...}, a local one uses {"command": ..., "args": [...]}. The Cursor adapter stages this file's mcpServers into the arm's isolated workspace. Copy to e.g. mcp/direct.cursor.json and point the arm's mcp_config at it.
